Bolt.guidance: No active performance optimizations for this sprint. Focus is exclusively on unblocking the build pipeline.

Palette.guidance: No UX or accessibility enhancements for this sprint. Focus is exclusively on unblocking the build pipeline.

Sentinel.guidance: Verify that the Architect's change to the root `pacman.conf` ('DatabaseOptional') is properly documented as a build-time requirement and does not unintentionally degrade the security of the installed system's configuration (`airootfs/etc/pacman.conf`), which must remain 'DatabaseRequired'.
